data.title: Tuned AMG GTR vs Lamborghini Huracan DRAG RACE_transcript

paragraphs.context: tuned amg gtr vs lamborghini huracan drag race _ transcript what will win in a drag race between a totally standard amg gtr and a lamborghini huracan spider evo? or we ' re going to find out by racing them over the standing quarter mile. i ' m matt watson and i ' m a bit of a cheat and you ' re watching car. this totally standard mercedes amg gtr has a 4 l twin turbo v8, but it ' s been tuned by pure tuning. it has an engine and gearbox tune as well as new downpipe. so rather than the standard 585 horsepower, 700 new m of torque, it now develops 756 horsepower and 1, 120 new m of torque. all that power is sent to the rear wheels only via a seven - speed dual clutch automatic gearbox with launch control. the car weighs in at 1, 550 kg and is worth about £100, 000, including all those definitely not cheating upgrades. the lamborghini huracan evo rearw wheelel drive spider has a 5.2 l naturally aspirated v10 that puts out 610 horsepower and 560 nm of torque. it sends power to the rear wheels only by a seven - speed dual clutch automatic gearbox with launch control. it weighs around 1, 600 kg and is worth about £170, 000. now, this amg sometimes struggles off the line. front engineed, rear wheel drive, lots of torque, spins up its wheels. however, this gtr does have something that ' s really handy, and it ' s adjustable traction control. so, what i ' m going to do is set it at just two away from almost completely off, and that should give me enough wheel spin, but not too much wheel spin that i just end up standing still in a pile of tire smoke cuz i ' m going to need good traction because while that lamborghini is rear wheel drive only, it ' s got its engine in the middle. so, it ' s got more weight over the rear axle and those things launch. the gearboxes in those, the seven - speed door clutch in those, yeah, i think it ' s better than the door clutcher in this. let ' s find out about that car from its owner. owner of the lamborghini. can you tell everyone your name? because it ' s i wish i had your name. what ' s your name? hi, my
